profile.name: Ryan Hicks
profile.tagline: An explorable city of AI-built experiments — games, data visualizations, music tools, and more.
profile.about: Every building in this city is a real project from my GitHub. Most were designed, built, and shipped with AI-assisted engineering. Click any building to visit the live demo or read the source.

districts.name: Arcade District
districts.blurb: Playable browser games — shooters, roguelikes, card tables, and puzzlers.

districts.name: Data Observatory
districts.blurb: Interactive dashboards and visual explorations of real-world datasets.

districts.name: Creative Quarter
districts.blurb: Music machines, art explorers, and generative toys.

districts.name: Web Works
districts.blurb: Practical apps, schedulers, and sites for the real world.

projects.title: SuperSolitaire
projects.blurb: A roguelike deck-builder built on Klondike solitaire — Balatro's run structure married to the classic 52-card game, with blinds, jokers, and escalating score targets.
quotes: A run is 8 antes — Small, Big, and Boss Blinds on fresh Klondike deals.
No timer. Your limits are recycles and discards.

projects.title: Choppa
projects.blurb: A browser homage to classic isometric helicopter strike games: four handcrafted missions, cinematic briefings, reactive audio, and a deterministic fixed-step engine.
quotes: Operation Dawnshield: level the alien forward bases.
A deterministic fixed-step loop, written entirely in TypeScript.

projects.title: Vivaforte
projects.blurb: A complete Life Force–style scrolling shooter written in pure 6502 assembly that builds to a cartridge-ready NES ROM — plus a MonoGame ECS starter project.
quotes: Pure 6502 assembly. Builds a cartridge-ready iNES ROM.
Runs on real NES hardware — 32 KB PRG + 8 KB CHR.

projects.title: Dot Souls
projects.blurb: An 8-bit browser dungeon crawler turned tactical action-roguelike: telegraphed attacks, dodges, parries, relics, and the Chapel Warden boss fight.
quotes: Enemies telegraph attacks — slash, dodge, guard, parry.
Collect relics, open the brass gate, defeat the Chapel Warden.

projects.title: Neon Breakout
projects.blurb: A dependency-free breakout game in a single JavaScript file — nebula backdrops, a looping synth soundtrack, and vector-art fallbacks so it always runs.
quotes: No build step, no frameworks — open index.html and play.
If an asset fails to load, vector art kicks in. It always runs.

projects.title: NES-Style RPG Sandbox
projects.blurb: A top-down Zelda-style action-RPG sandbox with tile-based collision, an animated hero, and room to grow into a D&D-grade ruleset.
quotes: Zelda-style camera and movement, growing toward a D&D-grade ruleset.
A bearded adventurer hero who can walk and animate.

projects.title: Euchre in the Adirondacks
projects.blurb: A full game of euchre against AI opponents, dealt lakeside in a cozy Adirondack lodge theme.
quotes: Trump has been called. Partner, do not let me down.
A full game of euchre, dealt lakeside in the Adirondacks.

projects.title: Poker in the Front
projects.blurb: Texas Hold'em in an 1860s Western saloon — AI opponents with distinct personalities, custom SVG avatars, and proper poker rules.
quotes: Smart AI opponents with distinct personalities.
An 1860s saloon — custom SVG avatars and proper poker rules.

projects.title: Aircraft Carrier
projects.blurb: A turn-based naval combat game and spiritual successor to Battleship: a 15×15 grid, four ship types with unique weapons, power-ups, and a smart AI admiral.
quotes: A 15×15 grid: Battleship with power-ups and a smarter AI.
Four ship types, each with unique weapons.

projects.title: Fruit Machine
projects.blurb: A classic 3-reel fruit machine with weighted symbols, achievements, and a fun-coin economy. Zero dependencies.
quotes: Three reels, weighted symbols, fun coins only.
Quick spin, adjustable bet, achievements to chase.

projects.title: Fiver
projects.blurb: A lightweight Wordle-style game with five-letter words validated against a locally stored dictionary.
quotes: Five letters, validated against a local dictionary.
A lightweight, static Wordle-style game.

projects.title: Logic Puzzles
projects.blurb: An offline-first collection of logic puzzles with a clean, distraction-free interface.
quotes: A beautiful, offline-first logic puzzle starter.
One commit. Sometimes that is all it takes.

projects.title: NASA Visualization Hub
projects.blurb: Interactive NASA datasets rendered in custom Three.js scenes: NEO3D near-Earth objects, planetary orbits, and a Wow! Signal overlay marking the 1977 Big Ear candidates.
quotes: NEO3D visualizes near-Earth objects and planetary orbits.
Press W to toggle the Wow! Signal overlay from 1977.

projects.title: NBA Intelligence Hub
projects.blurb: A season-preview radar for the NBA: power tiers, training-camp atlas, injury intel, and tempo analytics across a multi-page app.
quotes: 907 commits of power tiers, injury intel, and tempo analytics.
A season-preview radar for the 2025-26 NBA season.

projects.title: NCAA Basketball Hub
projects.blurb: A fast multi-page hub for NCAA men's basketball with all data flowing through a Cloudflare Worker proxy — no API keys in the browser.
quotes: All data flows through a Cloudflare Worker — no API keys in the browser.
A fast multi-page hub for NCAA basketball.

projects.title: GME Radar
projects.blurb: A live dashboard for GameStop's quote stream and intraday tape: rolling VWAP, minute candles over WebSocket, and an automatic demo mode when markets sleep.
quotes: Live quotes and minute candles over WebSocket.
When the worker sleeps, demo mode replays the tape at 2x.

projects.title: Birthplace WAR Atlas
projects.blurb: Where does MLB talent come from? Baseball Reference WAR archives crossed with historical state populations, on a map with a decade slider.
quotes: Where does MLB talent come from? WAR archives × state populations.
Maps, rankings, and a decade slider — all static, all instant.

projects.title: County Health × Air Quality
projects.blurb: Maps chronic disease burdens from CDC PLACES against PM2.5 pollution for every U.S. county, and highlights the outliers.
quotes: CDC chronic disease burdens vs PM2.5, county by county.
Highlights the outliers so you do not have to hunt.

projects.title: India Food × Cancer
projects.blurb: An interactive choropleth of India probing regional cuisine patterns against cancer incidence, with scatterplots, correlation estimates, and residual analysis.
quotes: Regional cuisine patterns vs cancer incidence, 2019–2022.
Choropleths, scatterplots, correlations, residuals.

projects.title: NZ Alcohol Explorer
projects.blurb: Five interactive D3 views of long-run New Zealand alcohol availability: volumes, per-capita trends, beer strength, seasonality, and a spirits cross-check.
quotes: Five D3 views of New Zealand alcohol availability.
Volumes, per-capita, beer strength, seasonality, spirits.

projects.title: Grid Insights Dashboard
projects.blurb: A Python-built dashboard surfacing insights from energy grid data.
quotes: Grid insights, dashboarded.
Python under the hood, 44 commits on the meter.

projects.title: 8Beat Chiptune Studio
projects.blurb: An 808-inspired drum machine and chiptune studio that runs entirely in the browser.
quotes: An 808-inspired drum machine in your browser.
Chiptune loops, no install required.

projects.title: Art API Explorer
projects.blurb: A 'Google for academic APIs': one search fans out to Harvard Art Museums, Princeton, Dataverse, UBC, and arXiv through a shared Cloudflare Worker.
quotes: One search fans out to Harvard, Princeton, Dataverse, UBC, and arXiv.
A Google for academic APIs, behind one Cloudflare Worker.

projects.title: Creature Creator Lab
projects.blurb: Generates whimsical creature profiles — goblins, gremlins, raccoons, trolls, ogres, and the occasional pigeon.
quotes: Whimsical creature profiles: goblins, gremlins, trolls…
…ogres, raccoons, and the occasional pigeon.

projects.title: Playful Pet Parlor
projects.blurb: A playful pet-parlor web toy starring a vet from Persia.
quotes: A vet from Persia runs a playful pet parlor.
Seventeen commits of pure whimsy.

projects.title: ECC Scheduler
projects.blurb: A React scheduling calendar powered by live Teamup data through a Cloudflare Worker proxy.
quotes: Live Teamup data through a Cloudflare Worker proxy.
A React scheduling calendar for the ECC.

projects.title: Food Roulette
projects.blurb: Can't decide what's for dinner? Spin the wheel and let fate cook.
quotes: Cannot decide on dinner? Spin the wheel.
Fate is a surprisingly good cook.

projects.title: Envisirad
projects.blurb: A site for radiology IT infrastructure services — Fortinet, Intelerad, and secure imaging practice.
quotes: Radiology IT: Fortinet, Intelerad, secure imaging.
The day job, in website form.

projects.title: No Thanks
projects.blurb: A concise, well-designed explanation of why 'free website' cold calls get a polite no.
quotes: Why free-website cold calls get a polite no.
All set, thanks.
